title: Text to PDF Converter — Offline & Instant
h1: Convert Plain Text Files to PDF Locally
description: Transform .txt files into clean, readable PDFs directly in your browser. No upload required. Ideal for users in Berlin.

sections.title: Why Convert Text Files Offline?
sections.content: Text files often contain code, scripts, or sensitive notes. Our offline converter ensures zero data transmission.

sections.title: How to Convert Text to PDF

steps.title: Open Text File
steps.description: Select your .txt file or paste text directly.

steps.title: Choose Font & Style
steps.description: Pick font size and layout preferences.

steps.title: Download PDF
steps.description: Export your text as a beautifully formatted PDF.

sections.title: Text to PDF for Berlin Developers
sections.content: Developers and writers in Berlin use our tool to convert scripts and notes without cloud dependency.

sections.title: Code Stays on Your Machine
sections.content: Source code, legal notes, medical records — text files converted with zero server involvement.

sections.title: Instant Text Rendering
sections.content: Convert any size text file to PDF in milliseconds. No upload, no compression, no delay.
